title: onosma wardii
intro: Onosma wardii, also known as the Tibetan Onosma or Onosma, is a type of flowering plant in the family Boraginaceae. It has been traditionally used in Tibetan medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant is believed to have anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties, which can help relieve symptoms of these conditions and promote overall respiratory health. Onosma wardii is often prepared as a herbal tea or infused oil, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat other health issues, including fever, coughs, and skin conditions.
